name: Aracnofobia
desc: Medo de aranhas — a fobia de animal mais comum no mundo.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Aranha balançando no fio" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<line stroke="#111" stroke-width="2" x1="32" x2="32" y1="0" y2="18"></line>
<g class="anim a-swing">
<circle cx="32" cy="30" fill="#111" r="9"></circle>
<circle cx="28" cy="27" fill="#fff" r="1.8"></circle>
<circle cx="36" cy="27" fill="#fff" r="1.8"></circle>
<path d="M24 26 Q14 20 10 24 M24 31 Q13 30 9 35 M40 26 Q50 20 54 24 M40 31 Q51 30 55 35 M25 36 Q17 42 13 48 M39 36 Q47 42 51 48" fill="none" stroke="#14324B" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2.4"></path>
</g>
</svg>

name: Ofidiofobia
desc: Medo de cobras — herança evolutiva que pode sair do controle.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Cobra rastejando" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<g class="anim a-slither">
<path d="M6 44 Q16 32 26 44 T46 44" fill="none" stroke="#14324B" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="5"></path>
<circle cx="49" cy="42" fill="#111" r="5"></circle>
<circle cx="51" cy="40" fill="#fff" r="1.2"></circle>
<path d="M54 42 l6 -2 M54 42 l6 2" stroke="#111" stroke-width="1.6"></path>
</g>
</svg>

name: Cinofobia
desc: Medo de cães, muitas vezes após um susto na infância.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Cachorro latindo" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<g class="anim a-bark">
<rect fill="#fff" height="16" rx="7" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6" width="26" x="14" y="30"></rect>
<circle cx="44" cy="30" fill="#fff" r="9" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6"></circle>
<path d="M40 22 l-3 -7 5 2 z M50 23 l4 -6 1 6 z" fill="#14324B"></path>
<circle cx="47" cy="28" fill="#111" r="1.6"></circle>
<line stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6" x1="18" x2="18" y1="46" y2="53"></line>
<line stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6" x1="34" x2="34" y1="46" y2="53"></line>
</g>
<path class="anim a-blush" d="M57 24 q4 4 0 8 M60 20 q7 6 0 14" fill="none" stroke="#14324B" stroke-width="1.8"></path>
</svg>

name: Acrofobia
desc: Medo de altura: sacadas, escadas, mirantes e pontes.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Montanha com nuvem passando" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<path d="M4 56 L26 18 L38 38 L46 26 L60 56 Z" fill="#fff" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6"></path>
<path d="M26 18 L32 28 L26 30 L22 25 Z" fill="#14324B"></path>
<g class="anim a-fly">
<ellipse cx="30" cy="12" fill="#14324B" opacity=".85" rx="10" ry="4.5"></ellipse>
</g>
</svg>

name: Claustrofobia
desc: Medo de lugares fechados: elevador, avião, ressonância, túnel.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Paredes apertando uma pessoa" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<rect class="anim a-squeeze" fill="#14324B" height="44" width="10" x="6" y="10"></rect>
<rect class="anim a-squeezeR" fill="#14324B" height="44" width="10" x="48" y="10"></rect>
<circle cx="32" cy="26" fill="#fff" r="7" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4"></circle>
<path d="M32 33 L32 46 M32 37 L25 42 M32 37 L39 42 M32 46 L27 54 M32 46 L37 54" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2.4"></path>
</svg>

name: Aerofobia
desc: Medo de voar — mesmo sabendo que o avião é o transporte mais seguro.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Avião voando" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<g class="anim a-fly">
<path d="M8 36 L44 30 L56 22 L50 34 L54 40 L44 38 L20 44 Z" fill="#14324B"></path>
<circle cx="49" cy="27" fill="#fff" r="1.6"></circle>
</g>
<path d="M6 52 h18 M30 52 h10" stroke="#111" stroke-dasharray="3 4" stroke-width="2"></path>
</svg>

name: Hematofobia
desc: Medo de sangue e ferimentos — a única fobia que pode causar desmaio.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Gota de sangue caindo" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<path class="anim a-drop" d="M32 8 q10 16 0 22 q-10 -6 0 -22" fill="#14324B"></path>
<rect fill="#111" height="4" rx="2" width="36" x="14" y="44"></rect>
</svg>

name: Tripanofobia
desc: Medo de agulhas e injeções — atrapalha vacinas e exames.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Seringa" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<g class="anim a-needle">
<rect fill="#fff" height="12" rx="2" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4" transform="rotate(45 33 26)" width="26" x="20" y="20"></rect>
<line stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4" x1="16" x2="26" y1="48" y2="38"></line>
<line stroke="#14324B" stroke-width="3" x1="10" x2="16" y1="54" y2="48"></line>
<line stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4" x1="40" x2="50" y1="14" y2="24"></line>
</g>
</svg>

name: Astrafobia
desc: Medo de trovões e tempestades, comum em crianças e adultos.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Raio piscando" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<path d="M14 10 q8 -8 18 -4 q12 -4 16 8 q10 2 6 12 q-4 8 -14 6 l-24 0 q-10 0 -8 -10 q-2 -8 6 -12" fill="#fff" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4"></path>
<path class="anim a-flash" d="M34 34 L26 48 L32 48 L28 60 L42 44 L35 44 L40 34 Z" fill="#14324B"></path>
</svg>

name: Nictofobia
desc: Medo do escuro — não é "coisa de criança": adultos também têm.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Lua e estrela piscando no escuro" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<rect fill="#111" height="52" rx="6" width="52" x="6" y="6"></rect>
<path d="M40 18 a12 12 0 1 0 8 21 a10 10 0 0 1 -8 -21" fill="#fff"></path>
<g class="anim a-blink"><circle cx="20" cy="22" fill="#fff" r="2.4"></circle></g>
<g class="anim a-blink" style="animation-delay:1.4s"><circle cx="26" cy="42" fill="#fff" r="2"></circle></g>
</svg>

name: Odontofobia
desc: Medo de dentista — leva ao adiamento de cuidados importantes.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Dente balançando" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<g class="anim a-tooth">
<path d="M20 14 q12 -8 24 0 q6 6 2 18 q-3 10 -7 18 q-3 6 -5 -2 q-1 -6 -2 -6 q-1 0 -2 6 q-2 8 -5 2 q-4 -8 -7 -18 q-4 -12 2 -18" fill="#fff" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4"></path>
</g>
<path class="anim a-blush" d="M50 16 q4 4 0 8" fill="none" stroke="#14324B" stroke-width="2"></path>
</svg>

name: Talassofobia
desc: Medo do mar profundo e do que não se vê debaixo d'água.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Ondas do mar profundo" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<rect fill="#fff" height="44" rx="4" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4" width="52" x="6" y="10"></rect>
<g class="anim a-wave">
<path d="M2 34 Q10 28 18 34 T34 34 T50 34 T66 34 T82 34 V56 H2 Z" fill="#14324B"></path>
</g>
<circle cx="32" cy="22" fill="#fff" r="4" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2"></circle>
</svg>

name: Glossofobia
desc: Medo de falar em público — o coração dispara só de pensar.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Microfone com ondas de som" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<rect fill="#14324B" height="22" rx="6" width="12" x="26" y="10"></rect>
<path d="M20 26 a12 12 0 0 0 24 0 M32 40 v10 M24 52 h16" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2.6"></path>
<g class="anim a-pulse"><circle cx="32" cy="22" fill="none" r="16" stroke="#14324B" stroke-width="2"></circle></g>
<g class="anim a-pulse2"><circle cx="32" cy="22" fill="none" r="16" stroke="#14324B" stroke-width="2"></circle></g>
</svg>

name: Fobia social
desc: Medo intenso de julgamento e avaliação nas interações sociais.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Rosto envergonhado entre outros rostos" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<circle cx="16" cy="28" fill="#fff" r="9" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4"></circle>
<circle cx="48" cy="28" fill="#fff" r="9" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.4"></circle>
<circle cx="32" cy="34" fill="#fff" r="11" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6"></circle>
<circle cx="28" cy="32" fill="#111" r="1.6"></circle>
<circle cx="36" cy="32" fill="#111" r="1.6"></circle>
<path d="M28 40 q4 -3 8 0" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2"></path>
<circle class="anim a-blush" cx="25" cy="37" fill="#14324B" r="2.6"></circle>
<circle class="anim a-blush" cx="39" cy="37" fill="#14324B" r="2.6"></circle>
</svg>

name: Agorafobia
desc: Medo de lugares de onde seria difícil escapar ou receber ajuda.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Pessoa flutuando em espaço aberto" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<circle cx="32" cy="32" fill="none" r="26" stroke="#111" stroke-dasharray="5 6" stroke-width="2.4"></circle>
<g class="anim a-float">
<circle cx="32" cy="26" fill="#fff" r="6" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.2"></circle>
<path d="M32 32 L32 44 M32 36 L26 40 M32 36 L38 40 M32 44 L28 52 M32 44 L36 52" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2.2"></path>
</g>
</svg>

name: Emetofobia
desc: Medo de vomitar ou ver alguém passando mal.
svg:
<svg aria-label="Rosto enjoado" class="fb-ico" viewbox="0 0 64 64">
<circle cx="32" cy="32" fill="#fff" r="20" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6"></circle>
<path d="M24 28 l5 3 M45 28 l-5 3" stroke="#111" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2.2"></path>
<path class="anim a-tremor" d="M25 42 q7 -5 14 0" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.2"></path>
<path class="anim a-drop" d="M50 20 q5 8 0 11 q-5 -3 0 -11" fill="#14324B"></path>
</svg>
